name: io.github.FormatixAI/mcp-server
description: Generate branded talent documents — assessment reports (Hogan, psychometric, leadership), executive profiles, shortlists and proposals — in DOCX/PPTX/PDF/Excel from a CV or LinkedIn profile.

environmentVariables.name: FORMATIX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Formatix API key (fxi_...). Get a free one with the claim_access tool using a company email.
